DROP TABLE IF EXISTS "Company";
CREATE TABLE "public"."Company" (
    "id" text NOT NULL,
    "name" text NOT NULL,
    "cnpj" text,
    "logo" text,
    "createdAt" timestamp(3) DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
    "reportEmails" text[],
    "reportScheduleTime" text,
    "reportScheduleDay" integer DEFAULT '5' NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "Company_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id")
) WITH (oids = false);

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS "Inspection";
CREATE TABLE "public"."Inspection" (
    "id" text NOT NULL,
    "status" text DEFAULT 'Pendente' NOT NULL,
    "date" text,
    "type" text,
    "createdAt" timestamp(3) DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
    "companyId" text,
    "companyName" text,
    "deadline" text,
    "description" text,
    "hasActionPlan" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
    "image" text,
    "locationId" text,
    "locationName" text,
    "observations" text,
    "registeredBy" text,
    "registeredByUid" text,
    "resolution" text,
    "responsible" text,
    "risk" text,
    "sectorId" text,
    "sectorName" text,
    "unitId" text,
    "unitName" text,
    "updatedAt" timestamp(3) NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "Inspection_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id")
) WITH (oids = false);

    "companyName" text NOT NULL,
    "name" text NOT NULL,
    "createdAt" timestamp(3) DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "Location_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id")
) WITH (oids = false);

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS "Project";
CREATE TABLE "public"."Project" (
    "id" text NOT NULL,
    "companyId" text,
    "companyName" text,
    "name" text,
    "description" text,
    "status" text DEFAULT 'Em Andamento' NOT NULL,
    "startDate" text,
    "endDate" text,
    "budget" text,
    "progress" integer DEFAULT '0' NOT NULL,
    "createdAt" timestamp(3) DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
    "image" text,
    "observations" text,
    "responsible" text,
    "source" text,
    "sourceId" text,
    "sourceName" text,
    "typeId" text,
    "typeName" text,
    "unitId" text,
    "unitName" text,
    CONSTRAINT "Project_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id")
) WITH (oids = false);


DROP TABLE IF EXISTS "Report";
CREATE TABLE "public"."Report" (
    "id" text NOT NULL,
    "company" text,
    "sector" text,
    "location" text,
    "description" text,
    "status" text DEFAULT 'Pendente' NOT NULL,
    "photoUrl" text,
    "reporterName" text,
    "reporterContact" text,
    "createdAt" timestamp(3) DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
    "approvedAt" timestamp(3),
    "photo" text,
    CONSTRAINT "Report_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id")
) WITH (oids = false);

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS "SystemLog";
CREATE TABLE "public"."SystemLog" (
    "id" text NOT NULL,
    "userId" text,
    "userName" text,
    "userEmail" text,
    "action" text,
    "resource" text,
    "details" text,
    "createdAt" timestamp(3) DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "SystemLog_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id")
) WITH (oids = false);

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS "TypeOfEntry";
CREATE TABLE "public"."TypeOfEntry" (
    "id" text NOT NULL,
    "name" text NOT NULL,
    "type" text,
    "severity" text,
    "createdAt" timestamp(3) DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
    "category" text,
    "color" text,
    "updatedAt" timestamp(3),
    CONSTRAINT "TypeOfEntry_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id")
) WITH (oids = false);

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS "Unit";
CREATE TABLE "public"."Unit" (
    "id" text NOT NULL,
    "companyId" text NOT NULL,
    "companyName" text NOT NULL,
    "name" text NOT NULL,
    "address" text,
    "createdAt" timestamp(3) DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
    "allowedUsers" text[],
    "reportEmails" text[],
    "reportScheduleTime" text,
    "reportScheduleDay" integer DEFAULT '5' NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "Unit_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id")

    "blockedReason" text,
    "companies" text[],
    "units" text[],
    "sectors" text[],
    "locations" text[],
    CONSTRAINT "User_email_key" UNIQUE ("email"),
    CONSTRAINT "User_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id"),
    CONSTRAINT "User_uid_key" UNIQUE ("uid")
) WITH (oids = false);

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS "WeeklyReport";
CREATE TABLE "public"."WeeklyReport" (
    "id" text NOT NULL,
    "name" text NOT NULL,
    "company" text NOT NULL,
    "week" integer NOT NULL,
    "year" integer NOT NULL,
    "createdAt" timestamp(3) DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
    "findings" jsonb,
    "companyId" text,
    "pdfUrl" text,
    "range" text,
    "unit" text,
    "unitId" text,
    CONSTRAINT "WeeklyReport_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id")
) WITH (oids = false);
